data.title: Ethereum spot ETFs had a total net outflow of $3.2947 million yesterday, and none of the nine ETFs had a net inflow
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to SoSoValue data, yesterday (April 8, Eastern Time), the total net outflow of Ethereum spot ETFs was 3.2947 million US dollars.

The Ethereum spot ETF with the largest net outflow in a single day yesterday was Fidelity ETF FETH, with a single-day net outflow of 3.2947 million US dollars. Currently, the total net inflow of FETH has reached 1.411 billion US dollars.

As of press time, the total net asset value of Ethereum spot ETF is 4.977 billion US dollars, and the ETF net asset ratio (market value to the total market value of Ethereum) is 2.78%, and the historical cumulative net inflow has reached 2.356 billion US dollars.

data.title: Bitcoin spot ETF had a total net outflow of US$326 million yesterday, continuing its net outflow for 4 consecutive days
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to SoSoValue data, yesterday (April 8, Eastern Time), the total net outflow of Bitcoin spot ETFs was US$326 million.

The Bitcoin spot ETF with the largest net outflow in a single day yesterday was BlackRock Bitcoin ETF IBIT, with a net outflow of US$253 million in a single day. Currently, IBIT's total net inflow has reached US$39.657 billion.
The second is Bitwise ETF BITB, with a net outflow of US$21.715 million in a single day. Currently, BITB's total net inflow has reached US$1.969 billion.

As of press time, the total net asset value of Bitcoin spot ETFs is US$85.756 billion, the ETF net asset ratio (market value to the total market value of Bitcoin) is 5.6%, and the historical cumulative net inflow has reached US$35.637 billion.

data.title: Kraken Announces Launch of WIN Token Spot Trading
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News: Kraken announced the launch of spot trading of TRON's ecological token WIN (WINkLink), supporting WIN/USD and WIN/EUR trading pairs, and launched the Reef Program airdrop event with a total prize pool value of US$90,000.
As one of the world's top compliant exchanges, Kraken is known for its security and strict auditing, and its average daily trading volume ranks among the top. WINkLink is the first oracle platform in the TRON ecosystem. The Any API Data-Feeds feature launched in 2025 leads DApp innovation, and its token WIN has a market value of approximately US$42 million.
Following the listing of NFT and JST, TRON has further integrated into the US compliance market. Kraken’s endorsement will enhance the global liquidity and credibility of WIN and help the global development of the TRON ecosystem.

data.title: Binance will restore the FUNUSDT U-margin perpetual contract funding rate settlement frequency to once every four hours
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to the official announcement, Binance will resume the settlement frequency of the FUNUSDT U-margin perpetual contract funding rate at 12:00 (Eastern Time Zone 8) on April 9, 2025. The funding rate settlement frequency will be adjusted from once every two hours to once every four hours.

data.title: U.S. 10-year Treasury yield rises to near six-week high
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: The U.S. 10-year Treasury yield rose 12 basis points during the day to 4.411%, the highest level since the end of February this year. (Jinshi)

data.title: LBank's online token RFC rose above 0.067USDT
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News LBank market shows: LBank's online token RFC rose above 0.067USDT, reaching a maximum of 0.0674USDT, and is currently quoted at 0.057USDT, with a 24-hour increase of 55%. Since the launch of LBank, the current increase has reached 5,086%, and the current market value is approximately 57.96 million US dollars.

data.title: Bitwise CEO: BTC is an ideal value storage tool for countries to get rid of their dependence on the US dollar
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Bitwise CEO Hunter Horsley said: "If you are a country that currently does not trust the United States, you will want to store value in non-US assets. But you are unwilling to hold currencies, debts or assets of other countries because they are more fragile and may be further devalued. Although gold is an option, it is difficult to transport and control. At this time, you will find that BTC is an asset that cannot be artificially devalued, is not controlled by any country, and can be immediately self-sustaining."

data.description:
Influencer Haliey Welch’s podcast returns with KSI, another figure with a controversial crypto past, as its first guest.
source: https://decrypt.co/314049/hawk-tuah-podcast-ksi-guest-past-crypto-controversies

data.title: Vitalik Buterin Discusses Future of Ethereum L1 at Hong Kong Web3 Carnival
data.description:
According to Foresight News, Ethereum co-founder Vitalik Buterin delivered a keynote speech titled 'The Future of Ethereum L1' at the ETHAsia 2025 event during the 2025 Hong Kong Web3 Carnival. In his address, Buterin explored the potential outcomes of further expanding Ethereum's Layer 1 (L1) network.

Buterin suggested that the same technologies used to scale Layer 2 (L2) solutions could eventually be applied to L1. He explained that L2 solutions leverage the asymmetry between production and verification, a concept that could also be utilized by L1. In such a scenario, Buterin outlined the roles L2 would play, including handling ultra-large scale operations that surpass the capabilities of native data availability (DA), improving transaction ordering with lower latency and protection against maximal extractable value (MEV), and implementing diverse virtual machine (VM) designs.

The discussion highlighted the evolving landscape of Ethereum's infrastructure and the potential for L1 to adopt innovations initially developed for L2, thereby enhancing the overall efficiency and functionality of the network.

data.title: Kraken Launches SUN Spot Trading
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News: On April 8, Kraken announced the launch of spot trading of TRON's ecological token SUN (SUN.io), supporting SUN/USD and SUN/EUR trading pairs, and launched the Reef Program airdrop event with a total prize pool value of US$90,000.
As one of the world's top compliant exchanges, Kraken is known for its security and strict auditing, and its average daily trading volume ranks among the top. SUN has a market value of approximately US$160 million, and the TVL of the SUN.io platform reaches US$650 million. It is the largest DEX in the TRON ecosystem. Since SunPump went online in August last year, the total transaction volume of Meme coins between the platform and SunSwap V2 has exceeded US$3.7 billion.
Following the listing of NFT and JST, TRON has further integrated into the US compliance market. Kraken’s endorsement will enhance SUN’s global liquidity and credibility, and help TRON’s global ecological layout.
